description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure with outstretched arms, standing on a rectangular base. The figure's right arm is raised and extended outward, while the left arm is bent at the elbow, with the hand open and palm facing forward. The robe drapes naturally, with detailed folds and a hood covering the head. Spiked, radiating elements emerge from the figure's left side and behind, adding a dramatic, almost celestial effect. The base is adorned with organic forms resembling plants or flames, enhancing the dynamic presence of the sculpture.
description: A dramatic robed human figure with outstretched arms and radiating spikes, standing on a detailed rectangular base with organic motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expressive face, outstretched right arm, and radiating spikes on the left side, with detailed robe folds and base elements visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the extended right arm, and the prominent spikes and organic forms on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hooded robe, the spread of the arms, and the arrangement of spikes and base details.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the draped robe, the open left hand, and the organic base elements, with less emphasis on the spikes.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure with radiating spikes and organic base elements
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a white background.
